title: HarderEnderEyes+
description: New harder way to make and craft Ender Eyes. Ideal for a more challenging experience. ✨
body:
![title](https://i.imgur.com/2QCIeYS.png)

![recipe-image](https://i.imgur.com/PeqlmH8.png)

## 📚 | ABOUT
• Making Ender Eyes is very easy in Minecraft Vanilla, there aren’t many challenges in making them. That’s the reason why I created this mod, I changed how the item is crafted to make 12 Ender Eyes even more difficult.

## 🌟 | CREDITS
• Mod created by t2rtle (ARR) ©️ 

## 📦 | MODPACKS
• You may freely use this mod in any modpack, as long as the download remains hosted within the Modrinth ecosystem.

## 📮 | QUESTIONS
 • 01. Do you want to create Forge versions for your mod? 
 > R: I have no plans to create Forge versions of HarderEnderEyes+ at the moment.
 
• 02. Can I distribute your mod? 
> R: **No**. Do not distribute my mods anywhere.
